inline_comments.message:
@Sylvain, I am not familiar with the certInitializer but the gerrit review for resources and traversal contained code to actually get the password from aaf using showpass, I don't see it here.

```
    export $(/opt/app/aaf_config/bin/agent.sh local showpass \
      {{.Values.fqi}} {{ .Values.fqdn }} | grep '^c' | xargs -0)
```

Can you check if thats the reason this is not working?

Hi @Harish,
this part is now done directly on AAF cert initializer as almost everybody needs it.
let's still check if the values are correctly retrieved
